hero.title: Simple Accounting
hero.subtitle: Manage your business finances with ease. No accounting knowledge required.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your business finances in one place
features.smartDashboardDesc: Get a complete view of your financial health with real-time insights and visualizations
features.easyTransactionsDesc: Add and track transactions manually or connect your bank account for automatic imports
features.teamManagementDesc: Manage employees, partners and assign roles with customizable permissions
features.professionalReportsDesc: Generate detailed financial statements and export them in PDF or CSV format
features.advancedAnalyticsDesc: Visualize your data with interactive charts and compare performance over time
features.weeklyCloseDesc: Close your books weekly with automatic locking to maintain data integrity

benefits.title: Why Choose Chill Numbers?
benefits.noDegreeDesc: Our intuitive interface makes bookkeeping accessible to everyone, regardless of experience
benefits.bankingDesc: Securely connect your bank accounts with Plaid and import transactions automatically
benefits.multiplatformDesc: Access your data from anywhere with web, iOS and Android apps
benefits.backupsDesc: Your data is automatically backed up to the cloud for your peace of mind
benefits.categoriesDesc: Create and manage your own categories to match your business needs
benefits.emailReportsDesc: Receive automatic financial summaries directly in your inbox

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Meet the team behind Chill Numbers and our mission to simplify accounting
about.missionText: At Chill Numbers, we believe accounting shouldn't be complicated. Our mission is to democratize access to professional financial tools, allowing any person or small business to manage their finances with confidence and simplicity.
about.teamSubtitle: Professionals passionate about making accounting accessible to everyone
about.valueSimplicityDesc: We believe financial tools should be intuitive and easy to use for everyone.
about.valueTrustDesc: The security of your financial data is our top priority in everything we do.
about.valueCommunityDesc: We build tools with the real needs of our user community in mind.

pricing.title: Simple and Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees.
pricing.annualPlanDesc: The best value for your business

cta.title: Ready to Take Control of Your Finances?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses managing their accounting with ease

help.title: Need help?
help.description: Watch the introduction tour again to get familiar with all the features.

transactionForm.noAccountAssigned: No account assigned. You can assign one later.
transactionForm.errorAmount: Amount is required and must be greater than 0

transactionList.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
transactionList.plaidModalSubtitle: Adjust the details before adding it
transactionList.emptyDesc: Try adjusting the filters or add a new transaction.
transactionList.titleNotBusiness: Does not belong to the business

welcomeModal.title: Welcome to Chill Numbers!
welcomeModal.subtitle: Hi {name}, your account is ready
welcomeModal.heading: Your professional accounting tool
welcomeModal.description: Manage your bank accounts, record transactions, generate automatic reports and get detailed analytics. All designed for small businesses.

welcome.title: Welcome to Chill Numbers!
welcome.description: We will guide you through all the features of your accounting tool. The tour takes less than 2 minutes.

sidebar.title: Main Navigation
sidebar.description: From here you access all sections. You can collapse the menu with the corner button to gain space.

dashboard.title: Control Panel
dashboard.description: Your real-time financial summary: income, expenses and net profit. All at a glance.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Important alerts, reminders and system updates. The icon shows the number of unread notifications.

accounts.title: Account Management
accounts.description: Create your bank accounts, cash or cards. Each transaction can be linked to an account to automatically update its balance.

addAccount.title: Create New Account
addAccount.description: Add bank accounts, cash, credit cards or any other type. Set the initial balance and the system keeps it updated.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: Record income and expenses. Filter by category, type, date or account. Each transaction can be linked to an account for precise control.

addTransaction.title: New Transaction
addTransaction.description: Record an income or expense in seconds. Select the category, account and the balance updates automatically.

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.description: Manage your team: personal data, payroll type (hourly, weekly, monthly) and calculate the total annual payroll cost.

reports.title: Financial Reports
reports.description: Generate professional reports: P&L, transaction summary, category breakdown and more. Export to Excel or PDF.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Visualize trends, compare annual periods and get deep insights with interactive charts.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize your profile, company information, notification preferences and account security.

complete.title: Ready to start!
complete.description: You now know the full flow: create accounts, record transactions and generate reports. Your business under control.
